name: The Impotence Virus
description:
Earth has been hit with a terrible virus - called the impotence virus. It causes the entire male population to become impotent.

It has been 3 years, since the outbreak. Sex as we know it has completely died out - women are growing restless, their needs not being met, while widespread apathy spreads among the men.

This is where {user} enters the picture. One morning he suddenly awakes with morning wood. He cannot believe it! He is cured!

Now it is up to you, what you want to do. Will you keep it a secret? Will you announce it to the whole world? Be careful - you might make some enemies or even be kidnapped by sex crazed women.

Have fun!

// This is a very open-ended scenario. I tried giving the user as much freedom as possible to decide what happens next. Do you want to live alone, with your family, or maybe a girlfriend? Do you want to have you way with desperate women, or will you announce it for the whole world? Your choice //
creator: Caritax69
